fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: schema_config
fields.name: schema_config

fields.description: Azure Storage SAS token (with or without leading '?')
fields.label: sas_token
fields.name: sas_token

fields.description: Use Azure Managed Identity for authentication
fields.label: use_managed_identity
fields.name: use_managed_identity

fields.description: Azure AD tenant ID for Service Principal auth
fields.label: tenant_id
fields.name: tenant_id

fields.description: Azure AD client ID for Service Principal auth
fields.label: client_id
fields.name: client_id

fields.description: Azure AD client secret for Service Principal auth
fields.label: client_secret
fields.name: client_secret

fields.description: Path to blob within container (supports Jinja2 templates)
fields.label: blob_path
fields.name: blob_path

fields.description: Data format: csv, json (array), or jsonl (newline-delimited)
fields.label: format
fields.name: format

fields.description: Whether to overwrite existing blob (if False, raises if exists)
fields.label: overwrite
fields.name: overwrite

fields.description: Header output mode: 'normalized', 'original', or {field: header} mapping
fields.label: headers
fields.name: headers
